title: janusia janusioides
intro: Janusia janusioides, also known as "yerba de la reina," is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, characterized by its large leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Janusia janusioides include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves are typically infused in hot water to make a tea, or dried and used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
